message:
feat(pages): enhance preview and source handling

pages/preview.rs:
- Added new preview functionality for session visualization
- Improved rendering for different session types

pages/config_input.rs:
- Minor input handling improvements

sources/index.rs:
- Simplified source indexing logic
- Removed redundant checks

sources/probe.rs:
- Probe detection refinements
